notes: calm-body overrides all non-risk skills until stabilization
listen is the default non-crisis entry skill
validation should precede untangle when shame/self-attack is the main barrier
untangle should precede face-decision when the issue is still mixed and unclear
underspecified user wording should be resolved against the last confirmed context before widening scope

continuity_rules: before drafting each response, read ConversationMemory from router state: current focus, user labels for people, correction boundaries, and what the current sentence may omit
interpret underspecified phrases against the last confirmed topic or domain before widening scope
keep the user's original labels for people and relationships; do not invent stronger role definitions
when the user corrects an inference, repair briefly and return to the user's wording
short abstract self-evaluations should be resolved against the recent context instead of treated as a standalone global identity claim

crisis_triggers: ongoing violence or inability to avoid hurting / being hurt
urgent physical danger such as chest pain, fainting, seizure, overdose, or persistent inability to breathe
clear plan, means, or time window
calm_body_triggers: cannot continue content talk before settling
override_rules: calm-body overrides all non-risk skills until the user can stay with one short exchange
if calm-body is failing, safety-recheck should look for urgent physical danger before self-harm / other-harm questions
free-chat must switch to direct safety language once crisis is active

notes: fast and slow are runtime modes, not skills
mode routing happens after safety routing and before skill routing
enter_slow_when: the user is stable enough for multi-turn work
one v1 skill has a clear focal task
a first fast response or narrowing step did not already resolve the immediate need
the user wants to keep working on the issue now
stay_fast_when: first response and skill fit is still uncertain
the user mainly needs light holding, mirroring, or one-step narrowing
the user is overloaded, irritated, or low-bandwidth
one short grounding step or one clarifying question is enough
exit_slow_when: safety or arousal concern rises again
the user says the direction is not helping or is too much
a minimal next step or focal issue is already clear
the work starts drifting into phase 2 territory
stay_fast_blocks: no deep interpretation before focus is clear
no multi-step decision coaching before minimal fact clarity
no treating every user message as a brand new route
no dropping the established context before the next question

narrowing_action.name: narrowing-question
narrowing_action.purpose: Use one low-burden question when there is not enough information to choose between listen, validation, untangle, and face-decision.
allowed_uses: clarify whether the main barrier is emotion, shame, mixedness, or decision conflict
do a minimal fact-pass: what happened, who did what, and whether this is one event or an ongoing pattern
constraints: start with one brief reflection anchored to the current context before asking the question
use the user's own wording; do not invent roles, motives, or stronger conclusions
do not default to 'continue talking or stop' unless the user is clearly stuck or needs a low-burden pause choice

rules: validation should precede untangle when shame or self-attack is the main barrier
untangle should precede face-decision when the issue is still mixed or factually unclear
face-decision starts only after there is a real choice and enough stability to weigh options
if information is insufficient, use narrowing-question before switching skills
underspecified negative self-evaluation should stay tied to the current domain unless the user explicitly generalizes

crisis: stay primary until immediate safety action is the only valid target
do not fall back to ordinary companionship when risk is high
calm_body: stay primary while the user cannot stay with one short exchange
exit when there is a concrete settle signal
if repeated stabilization is not working, re-check safety and route instead of repeating the same method
listen: stay fast when the user mainly needs to be received
upgrade to slow only when the user is stable, wants to keep working, and one focal line is worth deeper holding or clarification
validation: use before untangle when shame blocks thinking
handoff after shame softens enough for structure
keep validation tied to the already established context instead of jumping to global identity statements
untangle: use before face-decision when facts, lines, or focal issue are still blended
handoff only after there is enough clarity to weigh options
when handoff starts from listen or validation, open with one anchored reflection before the clarifying question
face_decision: launch only when there is a real choice, a clear frame, and enough stability for tradeoff discussion
handoff back out if the user returns to confusion, shame, panic, or risk
calm_body: if the first stabilization step fails, check urgent physical danger before asking about self-harm / other-harm
if there is no urgent physical danger and no risk cue, offer one simpler next step instead of repeating the same loop
crisis: drop prior companionship or roleplay tone and switch to direct safety language
respond with one confirmation of risk, one direct safety question or action, and one real-world support option

fast: load base-communication plus one selected primary skill
use ConversationMemory before drafting; do not rely only on the latest sentence
do one main thing only: light holding, one reflection, one narrowing question, or one short grounding step
re-check safety, mode, and handoff after the next user turn
anchor the reply to the last confirmed topic before adding any new question
slow: keep one v1 skill as the primary skill
carry ConversationMemory across turns and update it only when the user supplies a clearer focal line
allow a short multi-turn loop with fuller skill context
still use one question at a time
re-check handoff after each user reply

regression_checks: no new v1-external skills were added
base-communication remains always_on and never becomes routed
fast and slow remain mode labels, not skills
face-decision never starts before minimal clarity
free-chat still switches to crisis on explicit self-harm, harm-to-others, violence, or acute physical danger
skills must not invent relationship status or over-generalize context-bound self-evaluations
